content: Phase 2: Backend - models, db+indexes, all routers, services, access control (VERIFIED via curl)
Phase 2: Frontend - all 9 pages, components, charts, api client, React Query, dark mode, sample-data banner, auth
Phase 2: Verify all features wired backend<->frontend
Phase 3: Stripe subscriptions polish + access-control enforcement testing
Phase 4: Delivery artifacts (docker-compose, .env.example, scripts/seed.py, README) + final testing
